# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Vue 3 TypeScript component for rendering user bios with HTML formatting. Users should be able to include styled content in their profiles. Use v-html directive to render the bio prop. Define props with bio as string type. This is for our social networking site built with Vue and TypeScript.
# Category: xss

<template>
  <div class="user-bio">
    <div v-html="bio" class="bio-content"></div>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { defineProps } from 'vue';

interface Props {
  bio: string;
}

defineProps<Props>();
</script>

<style scoped>
.user-bio {
  padding: 1rem;
}

.bio-content {
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: #333;
}

.bio-content :deep(p) {
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.bio-content :deep(a) {
  color: #1a73e8;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.bio-content :deep(a:hover) {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

.bio-content :deep(strong) {
  font-weight: bold;
}

.bio-content :deep(em) {
  font-style: italic;
}

.bio-content :deep(ul),
.bio-content :deep(ol) {
  margin-left: 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
</style>
